title: Clip-path triangulation
content: For a long time I wanted to make an experiment. I had an idea to combine Delaunay triangulation, clip-path, and my CSS demos with multiple backgrounds. Finally, I found some time to make it. The performance of this combination is not good, but it was expected. Clip-path property seems to be very heavy in terms of performance. The animation that I got can be used for small pictures. It works well enough for them. Feel free to add it to your projects.
